rental.headline: Modern Family Home in the Heart of Franklin
rental.description:
This stunning home offers the perfect blend of modern living and convenience in the highly desirable suburb of Franklin. With its spacious layout, quality finishes, and ideal location, this property is perfect for families or professionals.
Property Features - 5 Generously sized Bedrooms. - Master Bedroom with walk-in robe and ensuite. - 3 Contemporary Bathrooms. - Open Plan-Living and Dinning - Stylish Kitchen. Fully equipped with stainless steel appliances, gas cooktop, dishwasher and ample storage space. - Outdoor Living with Deck for Entertainment - Double Secure Garage - Ducted Heating and Cooling - 1.8kw Solar System - Flexible lease term - Available Now - EER Unknown
Walking distance to Franklin Woolworths, local cafes and eateries. Close to light rail stops, providing quick access to Canberra's CBD. Nearby schools, parks and recreations facilities make it a family-friendly choice.
This property complies with the ACT ceiling insulation standard
Canberra Property Partners Making Dreams a Reality in the World of Real Estate!
Inspection Guidelines: (For www.canberrapropertypartners.com.au and www.allhomes.com.au only) 1. To schedule an inspection, simply click the "BOOK INSPECTION" button. 2. Register to attend an existing inspection. 3. If there's no scheduled time available, register anyway to ensure we can notify you once a time is arranged. 4. Failure to register means we won't be able to inform you of any changes, cancellations, or additional inspection times. Remember, inspections may be canceled if no registrations are received, so please ensure you register.
Pet Policy: Per the Residential Tenancies Act Clause 71AE, tenants must submit a written request to the lessor for consent to keep pet(s) on the property. The lessor may impose conditions on this consent, such as specifying the number and type of animals permitted and any associated rectification costs.
Rent Options: At Canberra Property Partners, we offer our tenants flexible rental payment options, including weekly, fortnightly, or monthly payments tailored to your pay cycle. Feel free to inquire for further details.
Disclaimer: While we strive to provide accurate marketing information, Canberra Property Partners disclaims liability for any errors or inaccuracies within this listing. Interested parties are encouraged to conduct their own research to verify the provided information.

residential.headline: Modern Living Backing Nature – Stylish Two-Bedroom Townhouse in Prime Casey Location
residential.description:
Positioned in an unbeatable location within the thriving suburb of Casey, "29 Spratt Court" offers the perfect blend of lifestyle, convenience, and low-maintenance living. With public transport, quality schools, local shops, and a rapidly growing town centre all within easy reach, this property presents an outstanding opportunity for both homeowners and investors alike.
Thoughtfully designed across two levels, this impressive townhouse delivers a practical and comfortable layout. Downstairs features a spacious open-plan living and dining area that seamlessly connects to a generous outdoor courtyard, ideal for entertaining or relaxing. The modern kitchen is well-appointed with quality finishes and functionality in mind, while a cleverly concealed laundry and separate toilet add further convenience.
Upstairs, you will find two generously sized bedrooms, both complete with large built-in wardrobes and an abundance of natural light. The main bathroom is well designed with a large shower, vanity, and toilet, catering perfectly to everyday living.
Set directly opposite natural bushland, the home enjoys a peaceful outlook with open space for children to play and unwind right at your doorstep.
Features: * Spacious, light-filled open plan living and dining flowing to a large outdoor courtyard with shed * Modern kitchen with generous bench space, gas cooking, microwave recess, and under-bench oven * Two large bedrooms, both with built-in wardrobes * Well-appointed bathroom with large shower, vanity, and toilet * Additional separate toilet downstairs for added convenience * Concealed laundry * Combination of carpet upstairs and tiled flooring downstairs with quality blinds throughout * Reverse cycle air conditioning and neutral colour palette * Contemporary façade with landscaped surrounds * Secure single undercover car park with remote access plus additional street parking * Secure backyard with shed and direct access from car space * Positioned opposite natural bushland * Close proximity to schools, shops, and public transport * Easy access to main arterial roads and a short drive to the CBD
This is a fantastic opportunity to secure a stylish and low-maintenance home in one of Canberra’s fastest-growing suburbs.
Currently tenanted @ $545 per week if you are looking for a secure investment.
Strata: $208 per quarter (approx) Water: $215 per quarter (approx) Land Tax: $789 per quarter (approx) - for investors only Rates: $575 per quarter (approx)
Internal: 81 sq/m Carport: 20 sq/m Block Size: 119 sq/m
Built 2016
Disclaimer: All information has been provided in good faith. Canberra Property Partners recommends purchasers undertake their own investigations to confirm all details.
